channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla Earnings, Elon Musk Due With Stock Near Key Levels; What To Look For
item.description: Tesla earnings are expected to rise, but the focus will be on CEO Elon Musk and robotaxi news. Tesla stock is near key levels

item.title: BMW unveils the new i7 with nearly 450 miles of range and Neue Klasse style [Images]
item.description: BMW gave its flagship electric sedan an overhaul for the 2027 model year. The new BMW i7 offers nearly 450 miles of range, advanced new tech, and an updated Neue Klasse design. more…

item.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Gains, Nasdaq Heads Near Record On Trump Ceasefire; Palantir Jumps (Live Coverage)
item.description: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index rose Wednesday after Trump extended the U.S.-Iran ceasefire. Tesla earnings are due late.

item.title: Tesla Earnings: financial expectations and what we should to hear about
item.description: Tesla ( NASDAQ: TSLA ) will report its earnings for the first quarter of 2026 this evening after the market closes, and analysts have already put out their expectations from a financial standpoint for the company’s first three months of the year. Additionally, there will be plenty of things that ...

item.title: Americans would get ‘universal high income’ via steady federal checks under Elon Musk’s new proposal. Will it happen?
item.description: “Everyone can have a penthouse if they want.”

item.title: Tesla Sees 30% Profit Growth As AI Focus Drives Investor Debate
item.description: Projected earnings rebound may be overshadowed by scrutiny on robotics, AI progress, and stretched valuation

item.title: Tesla Has Made Robo-Taxi Progress
item.description: In January, Musk said Tesla robo-taxis could be in dozens of cities by the end of 2026. Tesla launched a robo-taxi service in Austin, Texas, in June, with safety monitors in the front passenger seat. Bulls believe robo-taxis will eventually be cheaper than owning cars, disrupting personal transpo...

item.title: What Wall Street Is Focused On
item.description: Wall Street bulls and bears don’t always agree on Tesla stock. “The single most important [guidance] item on this earnings call is whether management provides any credible update on the transition to driverless [robo-taxi] operations,” wrote GLJ Research analyst Gordon Johnson in a preview report.

item.title: Top Stocks That Are Powering the EV and AV Revolution
item.description: From charging infrastructure to self-driving tech to zero-emission vehicles, Beam Global, Innoviz and NIO offer distinct ways to play the EV and AV trends.

item.title: Elon Musk Says If You Plan In Retiring In 10-20 Years Don't Stress If You've Got Nothing Saved — 'It Won't Matter' Anyway
item.description: Retirement advice usually comes with a calculator and a warning. Elon Musk brought neither. The Tesla and SpaceX CEO is floating a future where the entire idea of grinding toward a nest egg might not even apply by the time...

item.title: Tesla Q1 earnings: Should investors be betting against Elon Musk?
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) is set to report first quarter earnings after Wednesday's closing bell. As Wall Street prepares to hear what CEO Elon Musk has to say on the earnings call, what aspects of the EV company will investors focus on as it leans heavier into robotics? Annandale Capital founder George Seay ...

item.title: Tesla Stock Is Up Ahead of Earnings
item.description: Tesla stock rose in early trading Wednesday, before the company reports first-quarter earnings after the market close. Shares were at $391.34, up 1.3%, while the S&P 500 was 0.6% higher. Early gains left shares down about 9% since Tesla reported fourth-quarter numbers on Jan.

item.title: Tesla Finally Has What Wall St. Wants–A New Model
item.description: One of the primary criticisms of Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) is that its models are old. The fact that their software is updated “over-the-air” isn’t good enough for some investors. It has killed the Model S and Model X.

item.title: Musk's $60 Billion Cursor Bet Comes With a $10 Billion Exit Cost
item.description: SpaceX secures the right to acquire coding startup Cursor

item.title: SpaceX Lines Up $60 Billion Deal for AI Start-Up. It’s Taking on OpenAI and Anthropic.
item.description: The rocket manufacturer is piling into the AI coding race, a battle that will pit it against the likes of OpenAI and Anthropic.

item.title: Ranking the "Magnificent Seven" From Most to Least Attractive, Based on Future Cash Flow
item.description: Among Nvidia, Alphabet, Apple, Microsoft, Amazon, Meta Platforms, and Tesla, there are two screaming bargains and one pricey company whose valuation can't be justified.

item.title: Stocks Rise Pre-Bell as Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire; Tesla Earnings On Deck
item.description: The main US stock measures were trending higher in Wednesday's premarket activity after President Do

item.title: If You Bought Tesla When Cathie Wood Did, Here’s What You Have Today
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) has been one of the most debated stocks of the past decade, and no one has been more publicly attached to that debate than Cathie Wood. ARK Invest began accumulating Tesla shares around 2014 through its flagship exchange-traded funds, and Wood became one of the stock’s most v...

item.title: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Tesla, United Airlines, Capital One, DJT, Adobe, and More
item.description: Tesla climbs 0.8% ahead of first-quarter earnings, while United Airlines shares shrug off a full-year guidance cut.

item.title: Tesla: Bearish Reaction From 200-Day MA With Weak Relative Strength (Technical Analysis)
The Zacks Analyst Blog Tesla
item.description: Tesla heads into Q1 earnings with rising deliveries and a Germany rebound, but weak earnings surprise trends cloud its growth outlook.

item.title: Why SpaceX just made a $60 billion bet on AI coding ahead of historic IPO
item.description: SpaceX announced today it has struck a deal with AI coding startup Cursor, securing the option to acquire the company outright for $60 billion later this year, while committing $10 billion for joint development work in the interim. The announcement described the partnership as building “the world...

item.title: What To Look for in Tesla's Earnings Deck, Beyond the Numbers
item.description: Tesla’s “shareholder deck,” as the company calls it, is always a must-read for investors. This quarter, investors should be on the lookout for updates about several items, including Tesla’s AI ambitions. AI-trained robo-taxis are Tesla’s first big AI application.

item.title: Why Tesla Stock Is at a Crossroads
item.description: Tesla stock is in an interesting spot. It is down 10% since the company reported better-than-expected fourth-quarter earnings on Jan. 28.

item.title: Tesla Brings Optimus To Boston Marathon — But China's Robots Are The Ones Winning Races
item.description: Runners and spectators alike taking part in the 2026 Boston Marathon Monday may have been fortunate enough to visit with the Optimus Bot from Tesla Inc, a humanoid robot set for future mass production. Unlike Chinese competitors in the humanoid robot space using races as a physical test, Tesla us...

item.title: Inside Elon Musk's Strategy To Shelter Tesla From Billions In US Taxes—Was Bernie Sanders Right?
item.description: While Tesla Inc. reported a zero-dollar federal tax bill for 2025, findings have revealed another significant source of tax savings for the company. Over the past two decades, Tesla has reported little to no U.S.

item.title: Questions about Tesla spending binge ahead of earnings
item.description: Questions about Tesla's progress towards achieving fully autonomous driving at scale are expected to figure prominently when the company reports results Wednesday.Although Musk's leadership at Tesla and his other companies has made him the world's richest person, he has regularly overstated the n...

item.title: Tesla lithium refinery discharge contains toxic metals, drainage district demands halt
item.description: Independent lab testing has found traces of hexavalent chromium — a known carcinogen — along with arsenic and elevated levels of lithium in wastewater discharged from Tesla’s nearly $1 billion lithium refinery in Robstown, Texas. The Nueces County Drainage District No. 2, which manages the ditch ...

item.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise As Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire; Tesla Earnings Due
item.description: President Trump extended an Iran ceasefire after the stock market fell on canceled talks. Tesla earnings are on deck.

item.title: Elon Musk Promised Self-Driving Teslas In 2016—Now Customers Are Suing Him To Make Good On His Promise
item.description: Tesla Inc. is facing an international backlash over self-driving promises the carmaker made nearly a decade ago, with class actions now spanning California, Australia and a fresh European campaign. The suits land two days before Tesla reports first-quarter earnings.

item.title: Elon Musk Warned 3 Years Ago Commercial Real Estate Was Melting Down And Home Values Would Follow — But U.S. Housing Prices Held Steady
item.description: The housing market was supposed to crack. At least, that was the idea when Tesla CEO Elon Musk jumped into the conversation with a blunt warning that sounded like the early stages of another 2008. "Commercial real estate is melting...

item.title: Tesla, Boeing, IBM, Southwest earnings: What to Watch
item.description: Asking for a Trend Host Josh Lipton previews several of the biggest stories to come tomorrow, Wednesday, April 22, including a torrent of earnings results from various companies that include GE Vernova (GEV), Boeing (BA), AT&T (T), Tesla (TSLA), International Business Machines (IBM), Texas Instru...

item.title: SpaceX Financials Are Leaking Out. What Surprised Us.
item.description: FEATURE SpaceX is meeting with aerospace and tech analysts in Boca Chica, Texas, ahead of its trillion-dollar IPO. Some numbers have started to leak out. They are impressive.

item.title: Stock Market Today, April 21: Lucid Group Jumps After Uber Invests $500 Million and Commits to 35,000 Robotaxis
item.description: Uber’s $500 million bet and massive robotaxi order reshape the stakes for this embattled luxury EV maker, today, April 21, 2026.

item.title: Tesla just unlocked sales to 50,000+ government agencies
item.description: Tesla just unlocked sales to over 50,000 government agencies by entering a new agreement with Sourcewell, a purchasing cooperative. Tesla entered a new master purchasing agreement with Sourcewell , the largest government purchasing cooperative in the U.S. This will enable streamlined sales of its...

item.title: If You Buy Tesla Today, Here's the Bull Case for the Next 3 Years
item.description: Here's what Wall Street is pricing in for Tesla's robotaxi growth in the coming years.

item.title: Tesla’s California sales crash 24% as state’s EV market plunges to lowest since 2021
item.description: Tesla’s registrations in California crashed 24.3% in the first quarter of 2026, with the automaker selling over 10,000 fewer vehicles in the state compared to the same period last year. The data comes from the California New Car Dealers Association’s (CNCDA) Q1 2026 Auto Outlook report, which als...

item.title: Tesla Is Ramping Up Hiring for Its Taiwan Terafab. Does That Make TSLA Stock a Buy Now?
item.description: Tesla’s Terafab hiring push reinforces that it is serious about building its own AI‑chip stack for FSD, robotaxis, Optimus, and space‑based compute, but most of the future upside is already embedded in TSLA stock at current levels.

item.title: How much of SpaceX will Elon Musk own after IPO will surprise you
item.description: Elon Musk will retain dominant voting control of SpaceX after it goes public, according to the company’s IPO prospectus that was filed with the SEC. The filing reveals a dual-class equity structure giving Class B shareholders 10 votes each, concentrating power with Musk and a handful of other ins...

item.title: TSLA Stock Catalyst: Get Ready for a Larger Model Y
item.description: Tesla stock is gaining attention as a new Model Y variant and major AI-driven investments reshape its growth narrative.

item.title: Tesla Heads Into Earnings With Something To Prove
item.description: Weak start puts focus on future plans

item.title: Wedbush Delivers Blunt Message on Tesla Ahead of Earnings
item.description: Tesla Faces 'Code Red': Top Analyst Doubles Down With $600 Call

item.title: Bearish Tesla analyst has good news for Rivian stock investors
item.description: Analysts at BNP Paribas have been pretty steady on Tesla, making the Wall Street firm one of the few with a bearish outlook on the stock. BNP Paribas has an underperform rating and a $280 price target on the stock (compared to the consensus hold rating and $397.26 price target, according to ...

item.title: Tesla Q1 2026 Earnings Preview: Is The 'AI Powerhouse' Narrative Enough To Offset Waning Auto Demand?
Musk’s X Allies Launch News Channel MTS Live
item.description: MTS, announced on Monday, is the newest node of 24/7 information to monitor the situation.

item.title: Rivian Pitches Licensing Software To Automakers. The Android Of EVs?
item.description: Rivian reportedly wants to license its self-driving and operating software to automakers. Analysts are skeptical.

item.title: Tesla bolsters App with new safety, insurance, and storage features
item.description: Tesla is bolstering its smartphone App with a series of new features to streamline operations for owners. The new additions include fixes to safety, its in-house insurance offering, and storage management for Dashcam clips. The Tesla Smartphone App is one of the biggest and best features and adva...

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi-only Superchargers are starting to appear
item.description: Tesla is starting to build out Robotaxi-only Superchargers as the company is truly leaning on its Full Self-Driving and autonomy efforts to solve passenger travel. Last week, the company filed pre-permits in Arizona’s East Valley for two dedicated, non-public charging sites stocked with next-gene...

item.title: Jeep shelves its only EV in the US for 2026, but promises it will return better than ever
item.description: Jeep’s only electric SUV in the US, the Wagoneer S, will not receive a 2026 model year. The company said it will return with major improvements. more…

item.title: Tesla's Earnings Reaction May Be More Subdued Than Usual
